contact.heading: Get in touch.
contact.body: Have a question, suggestion, or feedback? We would love to hear from you.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your question or idea...
contact.successBody: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorBody: Could not send your message. Try again or email us directly.
contact.featureIdeaDesc: Something missing that would make your workflow cleaner? Tell me.
contact.bugGlitchDesc: Something not working right? I will take a look and fix it.
contact.somethingElseDesc: Anything on your mind. I read every message.
contact.builtWithCare: Built with care, maintained with gratitude.
